case_title: JOHN SPIRAKES VS. PL COMPANY AND ENTERPRISES, LLC. (NV)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY SPIRAKES, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PL COMPANY AND ENTERPRISES, LLC. (NV) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPIRAKES, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PL COMPANY AND ENTERPRISES, LLC. (NV) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN);PROOF OF SERVICE UNTIMELY SERVED FEB-23-2000, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PL COMPANY AND ENTERPRISES, LLC. (NV)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PL COMPANY AND ENTERPRISES, LLC. (NV)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LAWRENCE STEPHANS--CEO. DEFENDNAT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
